'''âh-n-d''' ('''hanada''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:libel|libel]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-n-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:libel|libel]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âh-n-d
|-
! Lemma
| hanada
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hanadithi|hanadithi]] || [[word:hanadiji|hanadiji]] || [[word:hanadishi|hanadishi]] || [[word:hanadi|hanadi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:hanaduthuth|hanaduthuth]] || [[word:hanadujuj|hanadujuj]] || [[word:hanadushush|hanadushush]] || [[word:hanad|hanad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:hanaduthu|hanaduthu]] || [[word:hanaduju|hanaduju]] || [[word:hanadushu|hanadushu]] || [[word:hanadu|hanadu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:hanadufuth|hanadufuth]] || [[word:hanadufuj|hanadufuj]] || [[word:hanadufush|hanadufush]] || [[word:hanaduf|hanaduf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:hanadethe|hanadethe]] || [[word:hanadeje|hanadeje]] || [[word:hanadeshe|hanadeshe]] || [[word:hanade|hanade]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:hanadothoth|hanadothoth]] || [[word:hanadojoj|hanadojoj]] || [[word:hanadoshosh|hanadoshosh]] || [[word:hanad|hanad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:hanadotho|hanadotho]] || [[word:hanadojo|hanadojo]] || [[word:hanadosho|hanadosho]] || [[word:hanado|hanado]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:hanadofoth|hanadofoth]] || [[word:hanadofoj|hanadofoj]] || [[word:hanadofosh|hanadofosh]] || [[word:hanadof|hanadof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:hanadĂŠthĂŠ|hanadĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:hanadĂŠjĂŠ|hanadĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:hanadĂŠshĂŠ|hanadĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:hanadĂŠ|hanadĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:hanadathath|hanadathath]] || [[word:hanadajaj|hanadajaj]] || [[word:hanadashash|hanadashash]] || [[word:hanad|hanad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:hanadatha|hanadatha]] || [[word:hanadaja|hanadaja]] || [[word:hanadasha|hanadasha]] || [[word:hanada|hanada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:hanadafath|hanadafath]] || [[word:hanadafaj|hanadafaj]] || [[word:hanadafash|hanadafash]] || [[word:hanadaf|hanadaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:hanadasha|hanadasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gohanadasha|gohanadasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokihanadasha|gokihanadasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:hanadnĂŒsha|hanadnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gohanadnknĂŒsha|gohanadnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokihanadnĂŒsha|gokihanadnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:hanadshĂ«sha|hanadshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohanadnkshĂ«sha|gohanadnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokihanadshĂ«sha|gokihanadshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hanadrosha|hanadrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohanadnkrosha|gohanadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokihanadrosha|gokihanadrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hanadmusha|hanadmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gohanadnkmusha|gohanadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihanadmusha|gokihanadmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:hanadsherasha|hanadsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gohanadnksherasha|gohanadnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokihanadsherasha|gokihanadsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:hanadngasha|hanadngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gohanadnkngasha|gohanadnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokihanadngasha|gokihanadngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:hanadyasha|hanadyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gohanadnkyasha|gohanadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokihanadyasha|gokihanadyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:hanadyamasha|hanadyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gohanadnkyamasha|gohanadnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokihanadyamasha|gokihanadyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:hanadnĂŒshĂ«sha|hanadnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gohanadnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gohanadnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokihanadnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokihanadnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:hanadnĂŒrosha|hanadnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohanadnknĂŒrosha|gohanadnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokihanadnĂŒrosha|gokihanadnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hanadnĂŒmusha|hanadnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohanadnknĂŒmusha|gohanadnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihanadnĂŒmusha|gokihanadnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:hanadshĂ«nĂŒsha|hanadshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gohanadnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gohanadnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokihanadshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokihanadshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:hanadshĂ«rosha|hanadshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohanadnkshĂ«rosha|gohanadnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokihanadshĂ«rosha|gokihanadshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hanadshĂ«musha|hanadshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohanadnkshĂ«musha|gohanadnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihanadshĂ«musha|gokihanadshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:hanadronĂŒsha|hanadronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gohanadnkronĂŒsha|gohanadnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokihanadronĂŒsha|gokihanadronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:hanadroshĂ«sha|hanadroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gohanadnkroshĂ«sha|gohanadnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokihanadroshĂ«sha|gokihanadroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hanadromusha|hanadromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohanadnkromusha|gohanadnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihanadromusha|gokihanadromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:hanadmunĂŒsha|hanadmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gohanadnkmunĂŒsha|gohanadnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokihanadmunĂŒsha|gokihanadmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:hanadmushĂ«sha|hanadmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gohanadnkmushĂ«sha|gohanadnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokihanadmushĂ«sha|gokihanadmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:hanadmurosha|hanadmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohanadnkmurosha|gohanadnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokihanadmurosha|gokihanadmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:hanad|hanad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hĂŠnĂŠd|hĂŠnĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hohanad|hohanad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hohĂŠnĂŠd|hohĂŠnĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohohanad|hohohanad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohohĂŠnĂŠd|hohohĂŠnĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒhanad|nĂŒhanad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒhĂŠnĂŠd|nĂŒhĂŠnĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒhanad|nĂŒnĂŒhanad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒhĂŠnĂŠd|nĂŒnĂŒhĂŠnĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻhanad|nĂŻhanad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻhĂŠnĂŠd|nĂŻhĂŠnĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻhanad|nĂŻnĂŻhanad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻhĂŠnĂŠd|nĂŻnĂŻhĂŠnĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luhanad|luhanad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luhĂŠnĂŠd|luhĂŠnĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluhanad|luluhanad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluhĂŠnĂŠd|luluhĂŠnĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lihanad|lihanad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lihĂŠnĂŠd|lihĂŠnĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilihanad|lilihanad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilihĂŠnĂŠd|lilihĂŠnĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kohanad|kohanad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kohĂŠnĂŠd|kohĂŠnĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokohanad|kokohanad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokohĂŠnĂŠd|kokohĂŠnĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kehanad|kehanad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kehĂŠnĂŠd|kehĂŠnĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekehanad|kekehanad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekehĂŠnĂŠd|kekehĂŠnĂŠd]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|91d6f4e}}
